output.monitoring_recommendation: Monitor first 3 runs in #ae-alerts. Watch for: TikTok row count dropping to 0 (source freshness issue), spend_usd anomalies (currency conversion), grain violations (duplicate campaign_id+date+country). The triage workflow will auto-investigate if tests fail.

decision_log.decision: transform_acquisition__daily is the correct DAG — tags match, schedule aligns
decision_log.rationale: DBT_INVOCATIONS shows 24 runs of this DAG in last 30 days, all with acquisition+daily selector

tool_calls.input: SELECT job_name, COUNT(*) FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_INVOCATIONS WHERE job_name ILIKE '%acquisition%daily%' GROUP BY 1
